forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+---
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '8780'
+title: 'M7: lineage + polish — agent trees from recordings'
+---
+Plan §14 M7: agent-name stamping on session events, delegation-tree reconstruction — now largely reading what Router records (creation metadata task 6j4bven: parent session id + parent tool-call id at session creation): the transcript browser rebuilds the parent→child agent tree from recordings alone. Plus examples (Examples/ per plan §13) and DocC. DEPENDS on M5.
\ No newline at end of file
